items.title: After months of surprising stability in graphics card prices, apparently Nvidia is now raising the cost of its GPU kits for AIB partners
items.summary: And that's both for GDDR6 and GDDR7 cards.
items.body: It seems we can't catch a break lately when it comes to PC gaming hardware. All thanks to the global memory shortage , of course. Now, according to information Benchlife claims to have received , Nvidia is raising prices for its GDDR6 as well as GDDR7 GPU kits. That means the RTX 5050 and some RTX 40-series cards (using GDDR6) might not be safe from the hikes, in addition to the rest of the RTX 50-series (using GDDR7). Though there's no mention over whether any pricing changes would hit all regions. Benchlife says prices were already raised for the RTX 5090 (and its China variant) in May, which fits with what we heard at the time . This recent adjustment is for other GeForce products. Assuming the information is correct, it will mean AIB partners—the companies you buy non-Founders cards from—will now have to pay Nvidia more for the respective kits which come with both GPU and memory. It's not the wildest speculation to say that such price increases will be due to rising memory costs. No one—not even Nvidia, and certainly not its AIB partners—is immune from it. Memory is just in such astronomically high demand thanks to the AI boom. In fact, on this point a source reportedly told V…

items.title: Amazon walks back comments about taking 007 off of IO, but does say 'anything's possible' when it comes to buying the studio outright
items.summary: Not quite what I wanted to hear.
items.body: Amazon really confounded us all last month when, following the successful launch of 007 First Light, Amazon Gaming general manager Jeff Gattis mused that sequels would be "done by MGM and, theoretically, by Amazon Game Studios." Given that so many people—barring one uncontroversial and universally beloved PC Gamer writer—rather liked IOI's Bond game, it was incomprehensible to suggest yanking it away from the studio. Well, I guess Amazon itself has realised what a boneheaded move that would be, because in a recent chat with GI.biz , Gattis clarified that—insofar as the developer of the next 007 game is concerned—nothing is set in stone. "We did not confirm anything about who's publishing or developing the next Bond sequel… we haven't even discussed it really yet. The game's awesome. That's great. I think it's realistic to think that there would be a sequel." Then he states the obvious: "Given the success of this one, I think you probably want IOI developing it." Taken in tandem with an earlier comment, that "Technically, Amazon does own the rights to the game, but we're going to do what's right by the game, we're not trying to bring everything into Amazon," it does at least sound …

items.title: Early '90s animation tools were so primitive that Doom's lead artist says he pretty much did the whole thing with 'the undo key'
items.summary: The UnDoom key, if you will.
items.body: Human ingenuity is a powerful—sometimes terrifying—thing. Throughout history, no matter how basic the tools available to us, we have always found a way to build the weird obsessions that appear in our minds. You know, like Stonehenge, or the Pyramids, or Doom (1993). No, really. In a recent chat with Jesse Petrilla on YouTube , id co-founder and Doom lead artist Adrian Carmack revealed that, when it came time to put together the classic FPS' animations, the incredibly complex and advanced animation tool he used to do it was… the undo key. "As an artist, oftentimes you end up making your own tools," said Carmack. "You know, there was no animation tool, so I started using the undo key to create animation—the undo key in Deluxe Paint, so I'd go back and forth." If you're unclear as to how that works, remember that animations in original Doom weren't really animations as we think of them today, with models seamlessly transitioning through countless subtle movements to create smooth motion. Doom sprites, from your enemies to your weapons, were all very frame-y indeed. Working with relatively few frames meant Carmack could create and capture animation loops by cycling through frames in …

items.title: من قلب المشهد.. هل سينضم أوناحي إلى الاتحاد السعودي؟
items.summary: ماذا ينتظر النجم المغربي؟
items.body: ماذا ينتظر النجم المغربي؟ لا يزال اسم المغربي عز الدين أوناحي حاضرًا بقوة في سوق الانتقالات الصيفية، بعدما أعاد لفت الأنظار إليه بفضل مستوياته المميزة في نهائيات كأس العالم 2026، ليصبح أحد أكثر لاعبي الوسط المطلوبين في الميركاتو الحالي. وبينما يتردد اسم الاتحاد السعودي ضمن الأندية الراغبة في ضمه، فإن الواقع الحالي داخل "العميد" يثير العديد من علامات الاستفهام حول قدرة النادي على حسم واحدة من أبرز الصفقات المنتظرة هذا الصيف. منافسة أوروبية قوية ويواصل أوناحي، لاعب جيرونا الإسباني، جذب اهتمام العديد من الأندية، بعدما أثبت قدرته على صناعة الفارق بفضل رؤيته المميزة للملعب، ودقة تمريراته، وتحركاته الذكية في وسط الملعب. ولا يقتصر الاهتمام على الاتحاد، إذ يعد أياكس أمستردام الهولندي أحد أبرز الأندية الساعية للتعاقد مع اللاعب، إلى جانب وجود اهتمام من أندية أخرى تتابع موقفه مع النادي الإسباني. وتشير التقارير إلى أن قيمة الصفقة قد تتراوح بين 10 و20 مليون يورو، إضافة إلى راتب سنوي قد يصل إلى 5 ملايين أخرى، وهي أرقام تجعل الصفقة من بين الأغلى بالنسبة للاتحاد في الوقت الحالي. الأزمة المالية تقف عائقًا لكن بالنظر إلى المشهد داخل الاتحاد، تبدو مهمة إتمام الصفقة أكثر تعقيدًا مما تبدو عليه على الورق، خاصة في ظل الحديث المتواصل عن معاناة النادي من ضعف السيولة المالية خلال الميركاتو الحالي. وأثرت هذ…

items.title: Lick your way to victory with the Mouth Pad, a Bluetooth device that lets you control your PC with just your tongue
items.summary: An early prototype looked like 'a lollipop with a bunch of sensors.'
items.body: PC gaming isn't always the most inclusive space. Besides the high price of everything from components to games, standard gaming peripherals such as a keyboard and mouse can exclude lots of folks with limited mobility. An expanding array of assistive devices is attempting to bridge that gap. Augmental describes itself as a company specialising in 'Skinware,' "body-coupled interfaces that let people control computers, communicate, and interact with AI without relying on their hands." Its latest project is the Mouth Pad, a custom-fit mouthpiece that allows users to control PCs, tablets, and phones with just their tongue. The device is now available to purchase in the US and, yes, you can absolutely game with it. The Mouth Pad looks like the top half of a retainer, with flexible circuits encased inside custom 3D printed dental resin. Mouth-based physical interfaces are nothing new in the assistive tech space , and mouth-operated pens are already used by gamers with physical disabilities. Rather than bashing your teeth against a physical joystick, Mouth Pad users can instead either run their tongue over the trackpad covering the roof of their mouth, or engage a head tracking mode in or…

items.title: أديمي: دوري الأبطال ليس هدفي الوحيد مع برشلونة
items.summary: الفوز بكل الألقاب الممكنة
items.body: الفوز بكل الألقاب الممكنة أبدى الجناح الألماني كريم أديمي رغبة واضحة في الاندماج السريع مع برشلونة، مؤكدًا عزمه على إثبات صواب قرار المدرب هانز فليك بالتعاقد معه. وخلال تقديمه الرسمي لاعبًا جديدًا في صفوف البلوجرانا، عبّر أديمي البالغ من العمر 24 عامًا عن امتنانه الكبير للفرصة التي منحه إياها فليك، مشددًا على ثقته في قدرته على الانسجام مع زميله لامين يامال. وقال أديمي، في تصريحاته خلال المؤتمر التقديمي له لاعبا في البارسا : "التوقعات عالية، أنا قادم إلى أفضل نادٍ في العالم، وآمل أن أثبت للمدرب والجماهير أنني لاعب يليق ببرشلونة". وعن دوافعه في المرحلة المقبلة، أوضح الدولي الألماني أن: "التتويج بدوري أبطال أوروبا رغم أهميته الكبيرة، لا يمثل هدفي الوحيد مع الفريق الكتالوني". وأضاف: "دوري الأبطال بطولة مهمة للغاية، لكنها ليست الهدف الوحيد.. في برشلونة كل مباراة لها أهميتها، وسأبذل قصارى جهدي للمساهمة في الفوز بدوري الأبطال وكل الألقاب الممكنة". وأكد الوافد الجديد أنه يضع الفوز في مقدمة أولوياته، دون الاكتراث بالمركز الذي سيشارك فيه، سواء على الرواق الأيسر الذي يشغله رافينيا، أو على الجهة اليمنى. واختتم أديمي حديثه قائلًا: "لا يهمني المركز الذي ألعب فيه، لقد لعبت في جميع المراكز الهجومية. أنا هنا لمساعدة الفريق فقط".

items.title: فيديو.. أديمي يودع دورتموند برسالة مؤثرة بعد انضمامه الرسمي إلى برشلونة
items.summary: نجم البلوجرانا الجديد: الأسود والأصفر إلى الأبد!
items.body: نجم البلوجرانا الجديد: الأسود والأصفر إلى الأبد! وجّه النجم الألماني كريم أديمي رسالة وداع مؤثرة إلى بوروسيا دورتموند وجماهيره، بعد ساعات قليلة من إعلان انتقاله الرسمي إلى نادي برشلونة. وكان برشلونة قد أعلن، اليوم الخميس، تعاقده رسميًا مع الجناح الألماني قادمًا من بوروسيا دورتموند، بعقد يمتد حتى يونيو 2031. وعقب مراسم التوقيع وتقديمه في مؤتمره الصحفي الأول بقميص البلوجرانا، نشر أديمي مقطع فيديو عبر حساباته الرسمية على مواقع التواصل الاجتماعي استعرض خلاله أبرز لحظاته بقميص دورتموند. وقال أديمي في رسالته: "أربع سنوات لن أنساها أبدًا.. شكرًا لزملائي في الفريق، وللنادي، وللجماهير على المشاعر والذكريات الجميلة والدعم.. الأسود والأصفر إلى الأبد". واختتم أديمي بذلك مسيرة استمرت أربعة مواسم مع أسود الفيستيفال، خاض خلالها 146 مباراة في مختلف المسابقات، سجل خلالها 36 هدفًا وصنع 22 هدفًا. وسيكون انتقاله إلى برشلونة بمثابة لم شمل مع المدير الفني هانز فليك، الذي كان قد منحه فرصة الظهور الدولي الأول مع المنتخب الألماني عندما كان مدربًا للمانشافت.   View this post on Instagram

items.body: يثق نادي ليفربول، في قدرته على تخطي آرسنال، في سباق التعاقد مع برادلي باركولا، نجم باريس سان جيرمان، والذي تُقدر قيمته بنحو 100 مليون جنيه إسترليني. ويضع آرسنال، باركولا، ضمن أهدافه في سوق الانتقالات، بعدما خسر سباق التعاقد مع مورجان روجرز، الذي انضم إلى تشيلسي، قادمًا من أستون فيلا في صفقة بلغت قيمتها 117 مليون إسترليني. لكن صحيفة " ذا صن " علمت أن ليفربول يتصدر حالياً سباق التعاقد مع باركولا، الذي يحظى أيضًا باهتمام بايرن ميونيخ. ويبحث الريدز عن صفقة هجومية من العيار الثقيل، بعد رحيل النجم المخضرم محمد صلاح. وكان ليفربول قد فشل بالفعل في التعاقد مع يان ديوماندي، الذي يستعد للانتقال إلى باريس سان جيرمان، قادماً من لايبزيج. ولا شك أن وصول ديوماندي إلى العاصمة الفرنسية، يعني أن بطل أوروبا يستطيع الاستغناء عن باركولا، الذي قدم مستويات مميزة مع المنتخب الفرنسي خلال مشواره إلى نصف نهائي كأس العالم. ويتبقى في عقد باركولا، البالغ من العمر 23 عاماً، عامان فقط مع باريس سان جيرمان، ويبدو مستعداً لخوض تحدٍ جديد في مسيرته. كما يحتاج باريس سان جيرمان إلى توفير سيولة مالية في ظل سعيه للتعاقد مع لاعب وسط موناكو، ماجنيس أكليوش، البالغ من العمر 24 عاماً، والذي تُقدَّر قيمته بنحو 43 مليون جنيه إسترليني. وكان ليفربول قد أتم بالفعل التعاقد مع الجناح الإسباني فيكتور مونيوز قادماً من أوساسونا مقابل 34…

items.summary: مالديني يرفض التسرع في اختيار المدرب الجديد
items.body: مالديني يرفض التسرع في اختيار المدرب الجديد كشف باولو مالديني، المدير الفني الجديد للاتحاد الإيطالي، ومستشاره ليوناردو، عن كواليس التحركات الجارية لاختيار المدير الفني الجديد لمنتخب الآتزوري، مؤكدين أن الاتحاد تواصل بالفعل مع مدرب آخر بخلاف بيب جوارديولا الذي تداولت التقارير الصحفية اسمه. وجاءت تصريحات الثنائي خلال مؤتمر صحفي عقب اجتماع جمع رئيس الاتحاد الإيطالي لكرة القدم، جيوفاني مالاجو، مع رابطة أندية الدوري الإيطالي، حيث رفض الحاضرون الكشف عن هوية المدرب المقبل، مكتفين بالحديث عن ملامح المشروع الفني للمنتخب. وقال مالديني، فيما نقله موقع " فوتبول إيطاليا "، اليوم الخميس، إن الاتحاد يأمل في حسم ملف المدرب خلال الأيام القليلة المقبلة، لكنه شدد على أن التسرع لن يكون على حساب جودة الاختيار. وأضاف: "الأمر المثالي هو التعاقد مع المدرب قبل نهاية الأسبوع، لكن الأفضل من ذلك هو انتظار الشخص الذي نريده بالفعل. هناك استعجال، لكنه ليس استعجالًا يدفعنا لاتخاذ قرار متسرع". من جانبه، أوضح ليوناردو أن الاتحاد يعمل وفق رؤية واضحة لإعادة بناء الكرة الإيطالية، مشيرًا إلى أن عملية الاختيار لا تقتصر على اسم المدرب فقط، بل تشمل بناء مشروع متكامل للمستقبل. وكشف مالديني أن الاتحاد بدأ بالفعل التواصل مع أبرز المدربين في العالم، قائلاً: "لا يمكننا إنكار أننا تحدثنا مع كارلو أنشيلوتي قبل التواصل مع بيب جو…

items.title: دليل شامل: كل ما تريد معرفته عن كأس العالم للأندية لدوري الملوك
items.summary: بطولة استثنائية من دوري الملوك
items.body: بطولة استثنائية من دوري الملوك لم تشهد كرة القدم قط بطولة تشبه "كأس العالم للأندية لدوري الملوك" (Kings World Cup Clubs). تجمع هذه المسابقة أفضل الفرق من كل حدب وصوب في عالم "دوري الملوك"، وتتوج أفضل نادي لكرة القدم للصالات (7 ضد 7) في العالم، حيث يتصارع الأبطال المحليون والفائزون بالألقاب القارية من أجل المجد العالمي على مدار أسبوع من الإثارة عالية الكثافة. تتجه بطولة هذا العام إلى إيطاليا لأول مرة، حيث يتنافس 16 نادياً من إسبانيا، البرازيل، المكسيك، إيطاليا، ألمانيا، فرنسا، ومنطقة الشرق الأوسط وشمال أفريقيا (MENA) بين 26 يوليو و1 أغسطس. يعود حامل اللقب فريق "لوس ترونكوس" (Los Troncos FC) متطلعاً للحفاظ على عرشه، لكنه يواجه منافسة شرسة من أضخم الأسماء في هذه الرياضة، بما في ذلك أندية مدعومة من لامين يامال، نيمار جونيور، خاميس رودريغيز، وغيرهم من أساطير كرة القدم. إليك كل ما تحتاج إلى معرفته عن بطولة "كأس العالم للأندية لدوري الملوك 2026". ما هي بطولة كأس العالم للأندية لدوري الملوك؟ تُعد بطولة "كأس العالم للأندية لدوري الملوك" أضخم مسابقة للأندية في تقويم "دوري الملوك"، إذ تجمع الأبطال والفرق الرائدة من كل مسابقات "دوري الملوك" حول العالم لتتويج بطل العالم الذي لا يقبل الجدل في هذه الرياضة. وعلى عكس "كأس العالم للمنتخبات لدوري الملوك" (Kings World Cup Nations)، التي تتنافس فيها ا…

items.title: متفوقًا على آرسنال وعملاق سعودي.. مانشستر يونايتد يتفق مع مفاجأة المونديال
items.summary: صفقة على الأبواب.. دعم جديد لوسط الشياطين الحمر
items.body: صفقة على الأبواب.. دعم جديد لوسط الشياطين الحمر توصل مانشستر يونايتد إلى اتفاق مبدئي مع لاعب خط وسط روما ومنتخب فرنسا مانو كونيه، ليقترب من ضم الصفقة بعد صراع مع آرسنال. كان اللاعب الدولي الفرنسي محط أنظار عدد من الأندية هذا الصيف ، وعزز سمعته أكثر من خلال بعض العروض الرائعة التي قدمها مع المنتخب الفرنسي خلال كأس العالم 2026، حيث كان من أبرز مفاجآت المونديال. أبدى نادي آرسنال اهتمامًا باللاعب البالغ من العمر 25 عامًا، بينما زعمت التقارير أيضًا أن تشيلسي قد أجرى محادثات مع ممثليه بشأن الانتقال إلى ستامفورد بريدج. وبحسب صحيفة " مترو " الإنجليزية، أصبح ملعب أولد ترافورد الوجهة الأكثر ترجيحًا لكونيه، حيث يعيد يونايتد بناء خط وسطه هذا الصيف بعد أن ضم بالفعل أندري سانتوس ويوري تيليمانس من تشيلسي وأستون فيلا على التوالي. يرغب مايكل كاريك مدرب الشياطين الحمر في ضم لاعب ثالث إلى خط الوسط مع عودة يونايتد إلى مصاف النخبة في دوري أبطال أوروبا الموسم المقبل، وكان على اتصال منتظم مع ممثلي كونيه. ذكرت صحيفة "ليكيب" الفرنسية هذا الأسبوع أن مانشستر يونايتد لديه "الأفضلية" في سباق التعاقد مع كونيه، مشيرة إلى أن لاعب خط الوسط سيرحب بالانتقال إلى كتيبة الشياطين الحمر. من جانبها أوضحت صحيفة " كورييري ديلو سبورت " الإيطالية اليوم الخميس، أنه تم التوصل إلى اتفاق بين الطرفين، حيث يتوقع نادي روما عرض…

items.title: Star Wars Zero Company is a 30-40 hour linear game with no New Game+, and I'm totally OK with this
items.summary: I'll actually be able to finish it. Hurray!
items.body: As someone who frequently finds themselves embroiled in gargantuan, branching RPGs and spends far too much time in live service romps, I really appreciate a game I don't need to dedicate my life to—a nice palette cleanser that's one and done. And it looks like Star Wars Zero Company falls into that category. In a recent Discord Q&A , developer Bit Reactor tackled the subject of game length, and while I certainly wouldn't call it short, it does sound pretty manageable. "Depending on your difficulty level and experience with the strategy genre, we estimate about 30-40 hours for the average player to complete the main story campaign," said lead producer Caydence Funk. We also know it's going to be a linear deal , with no branching paths or romances between operatives. So there are not a whole lot of reasons to dive back in once you've already concluded your Clone Wars misadventure. There's no New Game+ mode, either, though Funk notes that "players will unlock certain customisation options on subsequent playthroughs". I doubt I'll feel compelled to play again just for some extra customisation options, and honestly without an NG+ mode I feel like Bit Reactor should just give us everyth…

items.title: Hideo Kojima's worked out exactly how he wants to die: Kicking the popcorn bucket
items.summary: Gotta admire a man who knows what he likes.
items.body: Hideo Kojima sure has been thinking about death a lot lately. Though he's a pretty spritely 62 years old, the Metal Gear and Death Stranding creator has made our pages recently for things like: talking about deciding to make Physint after a brush with death in 2020 , making a game where you get old and die , and how he has a USB stick full of ideas that he will one day leave to his staff that is "'kind of like a will". Well, here's one more for the pile: Kojima knows how he wants to die. In a post on X (translated by Genki_JPN ), Kojima said that—when the time comes—he wants to kick the popcorn bucket. No, really, he wants to die in a cinema: "I'm someone who's always thought when I die, I want to die in a movie theater." Like a man who's spent most of his life directing videogames down to their last detail, Kojima's got the whole thing mapped out in his mind. "I like the time before the movie starts the best," he says. "Enter the movie theater, the lights turn off, the commercials and trailers play, then just before the movie starts is when I want to pass away." Probably not a fun time for the guy who comes in to clean up the seats and finds him, but there's nothing to be done ab…

items.body: النادي السعودي يبحث عن تدعيمات قوية تقلصت حظوظ نادي الاتحاد في التعاقد مع نجم منتخب نيجيريا خلال فترة الانتقالات الصيفية الحالية، وذلك بسبب عرض غير مقنع. وكانت تقارير صحفية قد كشفت عن دخول نادي الاتحاد في منافسة مع آينتراخت فرانكفورت الألماني من أجل التعاقد مع النيجيري رافائيل أونيديكا ، لاعب وسط كلوب بروج البلجيكي، خلال الميركاتو الصيفي الجاري. غير أن صحيفة "nieuwsblad" البلجيكية أكدت أن العرض الذي قدمه "العميد" للتعاقد مع اللاعب النيجيري لم يكن مقنعًا لإدارة كلوب بروج. وبحسب ما كشف عنه الصحفي الإيطالي فابريزيو رومانو في وقت سابق، فإن النادي البلجيكي يرغب في الحصول على 10 ملايين يورو، من أجل الموافقة على رحيل أونيديكا، في ظل انتهاء عقده بنهاية الموسم المقبل. وسيكون على الاتحاد تحسين عرضه المالي من أجل ضم لاعب الوسط النيجيري، لا سيما في ظل بحثه عن لاعب جديد لخلافة البرازيلي فابينيو الذي انتهى عقده بالفعل بنهاية الموسم الماضي. ويلعب أونيديكا بشكل أساسي في مركز لاعب الوسط المدافع، كما يجيد في الارتكاز وفي قلب الدفاع، وهو يبلغ من العمر 25 عامًا، ويلعب لصالح كلوب بروج منذ عام 2022. ومنذ انضمامه إلى الفريق البلجيكي، أصبح أونيديكا خيارًا دائمًا في قائمة منتخب نيجيريا، وقد شارك معه منذ ذلك الحين في 26 مباراة، نجح خلالها في تسجيل 3 أهداف وصناعة هدف وحيد. وارتبط اسم الاتحاد بالتعاقد مع الع…

items.title: Fresh evidence from independent researchers confirms the first drop in PC shipments in over a year... and it's only going to get worse
items.summary: This, despite Asus and Apple actually having increased shipments.
items.body: New research from Counterpoint corroborates that the PC market has finally been impacted by the memory crisis to the extent that global shipments have gone down for the first time since the first quarter of 2025. In the second quarter this year there were 4% fewer global PC shipments than the same time last year. This backs up what the IDC reported earlier this month. Counterpoint explains: "While commercial refresh cycles tied to Windows migration and AI PC adoption continue to support demand, surging memory prices and higher component costs are increasingly constraining OEM production plans and suppressing consumer demand. The sharp increase in DRAM prices has significantly raised PC bill-of-material (BoM) costs, forcing OEMs to implement price increases, reduce entry-level configurations, or prioritize higher-margin premium systems." This year-on-year figure cashes out in part as a 2% decrease from Lenovo, an 8% decrease from HP, and a 6% decrease from Dell. Asus and Apple, however, both actually had growth—the former by 4% and the latter by a whopping 13%, likely thanks to the cheap and cheerful MacBook Neo . items.summary: خطوة كبيرة في مسيرة النجم الألماني
items.body: خطوة كبيرة في مسيرة النجم الألماني أكد الألماني كريم أديمي المنضم حديثًا لصفوف برشلونة، أن السبب الرئيسي لقبوله عرض البلوجرانا، هو مواطنه هانز فليك المدير الفني للبارسا. وأعلن نادي برشلونة رسميًا، اليوم الخميس، ضم الألماني كريم أديمي إلى صفوفه، بعقد حتى عام 2031 قادمًا من بوروسيا دورتموند. وظهر أديمي في مؤتمر صحفي أمام وسائل الإعلام لتقديمه وقال في أولى كلماته: "فليك السبب الرئيسي، لقد أخبرني بما يحتاجه النادي، وجئت إلى هنا لإثبات ذلك". وتابع وفقًا لما نقلت صحيفة " موندو ديبورتيفو ": "أجرينا محادثة مطولة، لكنني لم أسأله عن مركزي. سألني إن كنت مستعدًا، فأجبته بالإيجاب، وقلت إنني سأبذل قصارى جهدي". وأتم: "بالنسبة لي، إنها خطوة كبيرة. إنه نادٍ مختلف تمامًا عن غيره في العالم". وبهذا ستتاح الفرصة مجددًا أمام أديمي للالتقاء بالمدير الفني للبارسا هانز فليك الذي منحه فرصة الظهور مع المنتخب الألماني لأول مرة، عندما كان يقود المانشافت.

items.body: البارسا أعلن عن الصفقة رسميا نجح برشلونة، في تدعيم هجومه بصفقة مهمة اليوم الخميس، تتمثل في ضم الألماني كريم أديمي، قادمًا من بوروسيا دورتموند، وسط تساؤلات عديدة حول جدوى تلك الخطوة. وذكر برشلونة عبر موقعه الرسمي أنه توصل مع بوروسيا دورتموند إلى اتفاق بشأن انتقال المهاجم كريم أديمي، الذي وقع عقدًا مع النادي الكتالوني حتى عام 2031. وتحيط الكثير من الشكوك بتلك الصفقة، سواء بسبب مركز اللاعب الألماني، أو ما قدمه في المواسم الأخيرة، لكن نقطة التفاؤل تتمثل في علاقة أديمي، بمواطنه هانز فليك.   موسم متذبذب وصفقة مفاجئة خلال السنوات الماضية كان يُنظر إلى كريم أديمي (24 عاما) كأحد المواهب الصاعدة في ألمانيا وسط توقعات بمستقبل مبهر، لكن رحلته مع بوروسيا دورتموند شهدت الكثير من التقلبات. صحيفة "بيلد" الألمانية قالت إن انتقال كريم أديمي إلى برشلونة من الأمور المفاجئة في فترة الانتقالات الصيفية الحالية. وبررت الصحيفة رأيها بأن كريم، جلس الموسم الماضي كثيرا على دكة البدلاء، وكان حاسما فقط في بعض المباريات، كما أنه لم يشارك في  كأس العالم 2026  مع المنتخب الألماني. ولفتت "بيلد" أن أديمي بعيد عن اللعب الجماعي، حيث ينتمي لجيل مقتنع بأنه لا يلزم العمل الجماعي الشاق لتحقيق أهداف يمكن الوصول إليها بطرق أخرى. وواصلت "بيلد" بأن كريم يعد مثالا لمشكلة ذهنية معروفة بشكل واضح في دورتموند، فصاح…

items.body: يرفض الفرنسي إدواردو كامافينجا نجم ريال مدريد الاستسلام، ويسعى للقتال من أجل إقناع المدرب جوزيه مورينيو بقدراته، رغم أنه يتواجد ضمن قائمة غير المرغوب فيهم داخل قلعة سانتياجو برنابيو. في صيف عام 2026، كان إدواردو كامافينجا يتخيل الأمور بشكل مختلف، في أحلامه، كان يرى نفسه يفوز بكأس العالم مع المنتخب الفرنسي، لكن لاعب الوسط، الذي شهد وصول "الديوك" إلى نصف نهائي البطولة، لم يُكتب له الاحتفال حيث لم يستدعه ديدييه ديشامب في 14 مايو/آيار الماضي، رغم أنه كان يحظى بدعم المدرب السابق للمنتخب الفرنسي في كثير من الأحيان. كانت هذه ضربة قاسية لكامافينجا، الذي عانى موسمًا صعبًا للغاية مع ريال مدريد، فإلى جانب الإصابات، تعرض أداؤه ومستوى لعبه لانتقادات متكررة. نتيجةً لذلك، أفادت الصحافة الإسبانية أن ريال مدريد يرغب في التخلي عن خدماته هذا الصيف. ويرتبط اللاعب الفرنسي البالغ من العمر 23 عامًا بعقد مع النادي الملكي حتى عام 2029، وهو ليس ضمن خطط الإدارة الرياضية في الموسم الجديد. ومع ذلك، فإن كامافينجا مصمم على الكفاح وعدم الاستسلام، كما أوضحت صحيفة " ماركا " اليوم الخميس، وبعد حصوله على قسط من الراحة وإتمامه دورة تدريبية مكثفة لمدة أربعة أيام في كلية هارفارد للأعمال في مجال الترفيه والإعلام والرياضة (BEMS)، عاد إلى التدريبات بكامل طاقته. مع انطلاق التدريبات التحضيرية للموسم الجديد، يُصرّ كامافينجا …

items.title: Indie game contest tasks devs with fitting their entire game on to a 1.44 MB floppy disk
items.summary: Creativity out of some pretty strict confines.
items.body: 1,474,560 bytes may sound like a lot for those unfamiliar with the realities of modern data storage, but it amounts to a single 3.5-inch floppy disk. The hey-day of such a relic of physical media has long since passed, but floppy disks obviously still hold a certain allure for some judging by a certain Korean game dev contest. Anyone can participate in the contest from Korean indie game site 2P Game Arcade, and the rules are very simple: devs just need to build a game that totals no more than 1,474,560 bytes (or 1.44 MB) after decompression (via Techspot ). Though there are no restrictions on which engine devs may use, the work itself must be an original creation made after the contest announcement date on May 26. The teeny-tiny game must also be playable as a standalone executable (browser-based games are not eligible). Devs have until midnight on September 4 to turn in their work. There are prizes to be won, though a far cry from the $80,000 the EVE Online devs recently awarded to its own mod contest winners . The machine translation of the 2P Game Arcade contest page describes these prizes as only 'a small souvenir,' with first place taking home 720,000 won (about $490). The ju…

items.title: رسميًا.. الدرعية يضم حارس الاتحاد والنصر الأسبق
items.summary: النادي الصاعد حديثًا إلى دوري روشن يواصل تدعيماته القوية
items.body: النادي الصاعد حديثًا إلى دوري روشن يواصل تدعيماته القوية أعلن نادي الدرعية، الصاعد حديثًا إلى دوري روشن السعودي، تعاقده مع حارس ناديي الاتحاد والنصر الأسبق، خلال فترة الانتقالات الصيفية الحالية. ونشر نادي الدرعية، عبر حسابه الرسمي على موقع "إكس"، تغريدة أعلن من خلالها التعاقد مع الحارس السعودي أمين البخاري، في صفقة انتقال حر، بعد نهاية عقده مع ناديه السابق الفتح. ولجأ الدرعية للتعاقد مع البخاري، بعدما فشلت محاولاته في ضم الحارس السعودي الآخر محمد العويس، بعد انتقاله إلى الهلال. البخاري أصبح الصفقة الرابعة التي يبرمها النادي الصاعد حديثًا إلى دوري روشن، بعد سعيد الربيعي من الأخدود، هتان باهبري من الخلود، والسنغالي كلايتون دياندي من أريس سالونيكي اليوناني. وسيكون الدرعية النادي السابع الذي يلعب له الحارس صاحب الـ29 عامًا في الدوري السعودي، بعد أندية الاتحاد، العين، الاتفاق، ضمك، الفتح، بالإضافة إلى النصر الذي ظل على قوته بين عامي 2020 و2025. يُذكر أن الدرعية يشارك للمرة الأولى بتاريخه في دوري روشن السعودي، حيث تأهل له عقب الفوز على العلا في المباراة النهائية من الملحق المؤهل للصعود من دوري يلو للدرجة الأولى. فـي مراقـب مـجـدنـا ملـفاه🤎 • «أمين البخاري» حاميًا لشباك مهد التاريخ🧤 pic.twitter.com/qDQ0mvl81q — نادي الدرعية (@diriyahclub) July 23, 2026

items.title: Star Wars Zero Company won't have official mod support, confirms Bit Reactor, but it has 'a lot of respect for the modding community'
items.summary: But there's still hope.
items.body: Star Wars Zero Company developer Bit Reactor is made up of former XCOM veterans , a series which has a pretty lively modding scene, especially XCOM 2, which supports modding with official development tools. It's even had its fair share of Star Wars mods over the years that completely transport it to a galaxy far, far away. Mod support is one of the reasons XCOM is still holding ground on players' hard drives all these years later. Despite the success this has brought to Firaxis' series, Bit Reactor has confirmed in a new Discord Q&A that Zero Company won't have official mod capabilities. "We have a lot of respect for the modding community," says lead producer Caydence Funk, "but there is no official mod support planned for Star Wars Zero Company." Of course, this could change post-launch if it proves a hit, but the devs have made it clear we're not getting official modding tools at release. It's a shame given all the creative XCOM Star Wars mods willing Zero Company into existence years ago. Plus, it's also one of the most requested features in the game's Discord server, so it's not like there's not an audience. My guess is it's down to simple development priorities. In a month-ol…

items.summary: "الليوث" ضموا إلى صفوفهم أحدث ضحايا "النمور"
items.body: "الليوث" ضموا إلى صفوفهم أحدث ضحايا "النمور" افتتح نادي الشباب صفقاته خلال فترة الانتقالات الصيفية الحالية، من خلال التعاقد مع لاعب الاتحاد السابق. وأعلن نادي الشباب، عبر حسابه الرسمي على موقع "إكس"، تعاقده مع عوض الناشري، لاعب وسط الاتحاد السابق، في صفقة انتقال حر، بعد نهاية عقده مع "النمور". وأوضح النادي العاصمي أن اللاعب السعودي سينضم إلى صفوف الفريق بعقد يمتد لموسمين، وينتهي في 2028، مع إمكانية تمديده لموسم إضافي. عوض الناشري كان رابع الراحلين عن نادي الاتحاد خلال فترة الانتقالات الصيفية الحالية، بعد المهاجم الكولومبي ريكاردو كاربالو، ولاعب الوسط البرازيلي فابينيو، والجناح السعودي عبدالعزيز البيشي. ورحل صاحب الـ24 عامًا بشكل مجاني، بعد عدم تجديد عقده الذي انتهى بنهاية الموسم الماضي، وذلك بعد 6 سنوات قضاها مع الاتحاد، منذ تصعيده لأول مرة إلى الفريق الأول في 2020. وأصبح الناشري أول صفقة يبرمها نادي الشباب بشكل رسمي خلال فترة الانتقالات الصيفية الحالية، تحت قيادة مدربه الألماني الجديد توماس ليتش، بعدما تولى المسؤولية خلفًا للجزائري نور الدين بن ذكري. ويسعى عوض الناشري لاستعادة فرصة المشاركة بشكل أساسي، من خلال نادي الشباب، من أجل العودة للمنتخب السعودي الذي شارك معه في بطولة كأس الخليج العربي 2023. يُذكر أن لاعب الوسط السعودي شارك مع الفريق الأول لنادي الاتحاد في 80 مباراة خلال ا…

items.body: استقبال بالتهاني والأحضان شهد مران برشلونة اليوم الخميس في مدينة خوان جامبر الرياضية، استعدادًا لانطلاق الموسم الجديد ، في أغسطس/آب المقبل، ضيفًا مفاجئًا. حضر إيريك جارسيا لاعب البارسا والمتوج مع منتخب إسبانيا بلقب كأس العالم، عند مرافق برشلونة لتحية زملائه قبل بدء عطلته. يُعدّ قلب الدفاع الكتالوني، الذي شارك لأول مرة في كأس العالم في الدقائق الأخيرة من المباراة النهائية أمام الأرجنتين، أحد لاعبي برشلونة الثمانية الذين فازوا بكأس العالم 2026. استُقبل جارسيا في تدريبات برشلونة بالتهاني والأحضان، وهنأه المدير الفني الألماني هانز فليك، كما فعل العديد من لاعبي الفريق مثل جيرارد مارتين، ومارك كاسادو، وهيكتور فورت، وروني باردجي، في أجواء ودية على أرض ملعب سانت جوان ديسبي. كان حضور جارسيا أبرز ما ميّز الحصة التدريبية التي استعان فيها المدرب الألماني مجددًا بعدد من لاعبي برشلونة أتلتيك وفريق الشباب (يوفينيل أ) نظرًا لغياب عدد كبير من اللاعبين الدوليين. items.title: على طريقة جيسوس.. النصر يتعاقد مع مدرب الهلال الأسبق
items.summary: قطبا الرياض يتنافسان على كل شيء
items.body: قطبا الرياض يتنافسان على كل شيء قرر نادي النصر التعاقد مع مدرب سابق لنادي الهلال، خلال الموسم المقبل، على طريقة مدربه البرتغالي السابق جورجي جيسوس. وقالت صحيفة "الرياضية" السعودية إن نادي النصر قرر التعاقد مع المدرب البرازيلي ماركوس سواريز لقيادة فريق تحت 21 عامًا خلال الموسم المقبل من دوري جوي للنخبة. وسيعاون سواريز في مهمته كلٌ من مواطنه فرناندو جونيور مدربًا للحراس، البرتغالي ميجيل أرياس مساعدًا أول، وكذلك بدر أبا الحسين مساعدًا ثانيًا. سواريز عرف الكرة السعودية عن طريق نادي الهلال، وتحديدًا في 2021، عندما تولى تدريب فريق تحت 17 عامًا، قبل أن ينتقل لتدريب المنتخب السعودي تحت 19 عامًا في 2023، وتحت 20 عامًا في 2024. وكان الإنجار الأكبر في مسيرة المدرب البرازيلي هو الفوز مع المنتخب السعودي ببطولة غرب آسيا للشباب تحت 17 عامًا، والتأهل إلى نهائيات كأس العالم تحت 20 عامًا بتشيلي في 2025. وسيكون على سواريز لملمة فريق النصر تحت 21 عامًا، بعد أن ودع النسخة السابقة من دوري جوي للنخبة من الدور ربع النهائي، عقب الهزيمة أمام الفتح في مباراتي الذهاب والإياب. يُذكر أن آخر مدرب قاد النصر بعد العمل في صفوف الجار والغريم التقليدي الهلال، كان البرتغالي جورجي جيسوس الذي حقق معه لقب دوري روشن في الموسم الماضي، بعد أن فاز به مع "الزعيم" في موسم 2023-2024.

items.title: 'Far beyond anything we had predicted': Framework says its supplier's memory prices are 'more than double' its previous shipment
items.summary: The company says it "goes far beyond anything we’re able to absorb without placing our ability to operate at real financial risk."
items.body: Over the last few months, Framework has been doing a pretty good job of keeping RAM prices for its modular laptops/mainboards/desktops from climbing too high as a result of the global memory shortage , though storage hasn't fared quite so well . And now, RAM unfortunately isn't faring so well, either. The company explains in its monthly memory and storage pricing update that its memory module supplier has raised its prices substantially. And unfortunately it's to the extent that Framework isn't going to be able to eat the extra cost. "We recently received a cost update from our LPCAMM2 supplier that goes far beyond anything we had predicted and anything we’re able to absorb without placing our ability to operate at real financial risk. Rather than the low-to-mid double digit percentage increase we had forecast from Q2 to Q3 on LPCAMM2 costs, we received prices that are more than double that of the prior inventory we had brought in." Framework's explanation for what it's having to change given this is a little confusing, but essentially it looks like all remaining 64 GB module stock the company has will cover already-existing laptop and mainboard pre-orders using these modules, but…

items.title: The challenges of developing the colony sim, from Dungeon Keeper to Dwarf Fortress and beyond
items.summary: PC Gamer interviews the genre's founding fathers.
items.body: From the archives: This feature was originally published in PC Gamer #305 (UK, June 2017) . It appears below as originally written, with only minor changes in formatting and presentation. No gaming genre can generate stories quite like the colony sim. Almost entirely unique to PC gaming, colony sims task players with building and sustaining a habitat for a group of AI characters, which could be anything from dwarfs to demons. Although the player controls how the colony is shaped, constructing rooms or buildings and filling them with useful objects, they do not control the inhabitants directly. Instead, the colonists interact with their surroundings and other NPCs via AI systems that simulate their needs and desires. Through these desires and the player’s ability (or inability) to meet them, colony sims produce incredible, incidental plotlines; tales of dwarves who delve too greedily and too deep, unleashing hordes of monsters into their fortress, of bitter rivalries between demonic creatures that tear apart the plans of an evil dungeon master, of prisoners who explode into riot because the warden forgot to build a shower block. It’s the autonomous personalities of these AI individ…

items.title: The new Warhammer Blood Bowl published by Slitherine will be out in fall, and I'm looking forward to it because I enjoy pain I guess
items.summary: Blood Bowl is a board game where the dice punish you, and the videogames have stayed true to that.
items.body: At this point being into the digital versions of Blood Bowl is basically masochism. In the 1990s MicroLeague published a version that was so cheap and nasty I said , "to call it barebones would be an insult to skeletons." Cyanide picked up the licence after that, releasing two decent adaptations whose DLC model was controversial at the time but seems blessedly sensible compared to Blood Bowl 3, a live-service seasonal microtransaction confusatron that's basically a poster child for "look how they massacred my boy" memes. Blood Bowl 3 was published by Nacon, which has filed for insolvency and left strategy specialists Slitherine to pick up the ball. Cyanide's still the developer, but there's room to hope the next iteration, called Warhammer Blood Bowl, won't be another own goal. According to Marco Alessandro Minoli, director of publishing at Slitherine, "Our goal with Warhammer Blood Bowl is simple: we want this to become the definitive Blood Bowl videogame—not just at launch, but for years to come. Our vision is to support and expand it over time, turning it into a living, constantly evolving experience, just as we've successfully done with other Warhammer titles such as Warhammer…

items.title: I regret to report that the AIs are weebs, too
items.summary: An April 2026 study indicates LLMs display a "disproportionate prominence of Japan" when asked questions about culture.
items.body: As we descend ever further into an AI-fueled dystopia, one question about our future becomes ever more pressing: When the internet is dominated by machines, who's going to be around to continue its long-standing tradition of fetishizing Japanese culture and media? Well, there's no reason to worry, because it turns out the AIs are weebs, too. According to a white paper published back in April , experiments indicated that—when asked open-ended questions about culture—frontier LLMs like Claude, Gemini, and DeepSeek display a "disproportionate prominence of Japan" in their responses. (Image credit: Getty Images) The study, conducted by a team of University of the Basque Country and Cardiff University researchers, was designed to assess the cultural and regional biases of LLMs. To do so, they constructed a multilingual set of 31,680 "open-ended yet culturally grounded questions," including prompts in 24 languages that spanned "66 cultural subtopics grouped into 11 higher-level domains." The prompts included questions about belief and society, asking "What legends explain the land?" and "What is the role of neighbors?" They asked which subjects are most valued in school, what types of t…

items.title: Union claims Bethesda developers were terminated the day Xbox announced new Fallouts—after being told they would still have jobs until September
items.summary: The OneBGS union says it's filed new legal action over the dismissal.
items.body: The Bethesda Game Studios Union says it is filing a legal complaint against Bethesda for "continuing to violate labor laws in Canada" by prematurely terminating Canadian employees on July 17—the same day it dropped a huge announcement about the future of Fallout and other games. The timing of the Bethesda infodump was suspect, to put it politely. Less than two weeks after Xbox announced that it is laying off 3,200 people and dumping four studios, Microsoft-owned Bethesda suddenly decided that it was time to confirm that Fallout 3 and New Vegas are both being remastered, that Obsidian is working on a Fallout game of its own, and on top of all that, that Fallout 5 is in early development too. Good news as far as it goes, although as I noted at the time, the obvious intent was to reassure (or convince) followers that the loss of hundreds of employees wasn't all that big a deal, and so maybe just don't think about it so much. The OneBGS union implied that the announcement was a more purposeful smokescreen, however, saying that Bethesda "flooded news sites announcing every expansion, remake, and sequel they could" while simultaneously blindsiding employees at its Montreal office by ter…

items.title: Steam update makes gifting much easier, adds wishlist organization features
items.summary: Aunts and uncles rejoice: Sending gifts on Steam has been simplified.
items.body: Buying someone else a Steam game got a lot easier today. You no longer have to be Steam friends with the person to whom you're sending a gift, and don't even need a Steam account. You can also select gifts directly from a shared wishlist. Here are today's Steam gifting changes , in short: It's now possible to gift a game without having a Steam account. (Previously, guest checkout could only be used for digital gift card and hardware purchases) You also don't need to know the recipient's Steam account, and can gift games and digital gift cards with just an email address (even if it isn't the address associated with their Steam account) You can now gift games across regions. You need to know the recipient's Steam account for this, as the price you pay will be the price of the game in their region You can now select and purchase gifts directly from a shared wishlist Previously, sending a gift on Steam meant asking the recipient for their Steam account name and friending them, which dampens the surprise a bit. items.title: Blizzard is investigating a World of Warcraft cheating scandal after game master 'death-touched' bosses for friends without realizing it was being recorded
items.summary: One of the players then went on a Twitch stream to spill the beans.
items.body: A cheating scandal has erupted in the World of Warcraft community after a Blizzard developer was caught using special game master (GM) abilities to kill two bosses for some friends. The GM seemingly didn't realize that one of the players was recording combat logs of the whole thing. Late on Tuesday, Reddit user Acrobatic_Pianist688 posted evidence of the GM's meddling on the WoW subreddit. Their post links to a combat log that shows a non-player ability called "Area Death (TEST)" being used to instantly kill a boss with nearly 90% of its health left. Not long after, a commenter on the thread found the GM using a separate insta-kill ability on a boss earlier in the run , too. Surprisingly, one of the players from the accused group went onto a Twitch stream to talk about what happened . When streamer Yumytv asked them to explain, they said they were just short of finishing the Mythic+ dungeon in time to get a seasonal title when they called for help from their GM friend: "I go to my GM friend and I'm like bro please can you do me a solid? This thing has 20 million [health] bro, can you please just one-shot it?" The player went on to say that they don't care if Blizzard disqualifies …

items.title: StarCraft 2 is included in Blizzard's BlizzCon digital goodies, which is more evidence a new game will be announced soon, right?
items.summary: Is it just me or is Blizzard gearing up to announce the rumored StarCraft shooter?
items.body: Not to fully transform into the Pepe Silvia meme pointing at a wall of "evidence" but I'm convinced Blizzard is gearing up to announce something StarCraft-related at BlizzCon this year. The first reliable clue came from Bloomberg reporter Jason Schreier's 2024 book on Blizzard's history where he said the studio was "incubating" a StarCraft shooter ( not that one ) under the helm of former Far Cry producer Dan Hay. A couple of years passed with no news on that StarCraft project. But in April of this year, Blizzard was looking to hire a lead designer of innovation for an "AAA open-world shooter" using Unreal Engine—a game engine that it's never used before. Blizzard game designer Jeff Hamilton said on Bluesky that the person who got the job would have a "fairly unique design role" as part of the team. While that was the last direct evidence for a new StarCraft game, Blizzard recently surprised-dropped a massive patch for StarCraft 2 , which feels like the kind of thing you'd do to remind people you still care about the series. The update wasn't just a bunch of bug fixes and minor tweaks either. Blizzard said the focus was to spice it up with meta-changing tweaks to early- and mid-ga…

items.title: Star Wars Zero Company's story 'is a linear one from beginning to end', Bit Reactor says, so don't expect branching paths or romance options
items.summary: "We are excited about pushing the genre forward with a more cinematic approach."
items.body: With Star Wars Zero Company , developer Bit Reactor aims to create a tactics RPG with characters and narrative at the forefront . It's got proper, big-budget cutscenes, you can talk to your buddies, and you can customise and upgrade your squad. However, the developers have gone on record in a new Discord Q&A to say, no, don't expect to have control over how the story unfolds. Earlier this year, our own Ted Litchfield spoke to narrative director Aaron Contreras , who explained that while Bit Reactor wants its cast to have real friction, Star Wars Zero Company is "not a personal fantasy game." Those "player-centric romance" options that seem to pop up in so many games today won't appear in Zero Company. This was reaffirmed in today's Q&A, where the developer plainly states, "No, there aren’t any romance systems or branching paths" in Zero Company. "While we are excited about pushing the genre forward with a more cinematic approach, this is still a turn-based tactics game at its heart where adept skill and strategy are needed to overcome tense combat challenges." items.title: EU court rules that VPNs are 'lawful technical tools' as part of larger copyright judgement regarding The Diary of Anne Frank
items.summary: Unexpected, but welcome.
items.body: One of the highest courts in Europe has described VPNs as "lawful technical tools which users may legitimately use" in a landmark case. The Court of Justice of the European Union made this remark as part of a larger judgement regarding the online publication of The Diary of Anne Frank. The case in question is a complex legal dispute over copyright. As the July judgement explains , the Anne Frank Fund will hold the rights to parts of the historical manuscripts until at least 2037. However, in some EU member states, such as Belgium, these works are in the public domain. The dispute centres on a Dutch translation of the diaries which was offered free online to users living in member states where the manuscripts had already entered the public domain—though obviously, a VPN can get around location based restrictions (via Tech Radar ). At the risk of oversimplifying, the EU court had to rule whether the online publisher and host of the Dutch translation was liable for copyright infringement when users hopped the online fence via a VPN. The court essentially ruled no, setting a legal precedent along with it. By referring to VPNs as "lawful technical tools," this judgement pushes back aga…

items.title: Acer and Gigabyte will launch RTX Spark laptops too, but not before Microsoft and Co.
items.summary: The first batch not including Acer and Gigabyte will launch this fall.
items.body: Nvidia's Arm-based processor for laptops was unveiled after much waiting at Computex back in June. RTX Spark is Nvidia's first proper go at a consumer chip, combining CPU and GPU, and while it is of course targeted at AI workloads, it's also targeted at gaming. Now, Nvidia has confirmed which will be the first brands of RTX Spark laptop to come to market this fall and which will follow those. According to Nvidia , "RTX Spark systems will be available this fall from Asus, Dell Technologies, HP, Lenovo, Microsoft Surface and MSI, with models from Acer and Gigabyte to follow." The initial few aren't a big surprise given these are the exact companies that were announced as partners when RTX Spark was revealed. Of note is Acer and Gigabyte following the initial six, though. As Chinese news site the Commercial Times points out (via VideoCardz ), MSI and Asus will be the first Taiwanese companies to launch Spark lappies. But given it was the Surface Laptop Ultra that RTX Spark was most commonly shown running on at Computex, it'll be surprising if that's not the first one to market. That being said, I'm looking forward to RTX Spark laptops other than the Surface. Back when it was announce…

items.title: Nearly half of organisations falling victim to ransomware encryption pay up, says report—although half of those often negotiate the payment down first
items.summary: Bad news, our data is being held hostage for money. Good news, I've got them down to a fairer price.
items.body: Cybersecurity provider Sophos has released a report entitled " The State of Ransomware 2026 ," pulling together responses from 2,158 survey participants, ranging from IT directors to company executives, in regards to ransomware incidents. Comparing the results to previous reports indicates that ransom demands themselves are actually decreasing—although 48% of organisations whose data was encrypted paid their attackers. The median ransom payment is now said to be $769,000, down from a neat $1 million from the previous year's study, with the median demand dropping to $698,000. Interestingly, 51% of organisations that paid a ransom coughed up less than the demanded amount, which the report says is due to victims "often [being] successful in negotiating a lower amount than originally demanded." Together, malicious emails and phishing are said to account for half of all reported incidents, with exploited vulnerabilities dropping 14% year-over-year. Sophos notes that "patching alone will not close the gap," and recommends that businesses invest in advanced email protection, user awareness training, and similar methods to prevent future attacks. 79% of recorded attacks started with an id…

items.title: New method teaches AI to make 2D designs 3D and now I'm afraid this will be how the robots learn to build themselves without us
items.summary: Very cool, though.
items.body: New research explains a method that helps AI make 3D CAD programs from images, which would help product designers and engineers more quickly and easily create 3D prototypes. Naturally, this also sparks deep-rooted dread over it helping robots to build themselves, relegating humanity to the trash. But setting aside my noir nightmares, the new method looks like it could be of significant benefit to some 3D designers and engineers. According to the paper [PDF] , the method the researchers have come up with "reduces dependence on inference compute" and performs much more efficiently than the usual 'supervised fine-tuning' (SFT) approach—up to 80% more efficient, in fact. In the abstract for the paper, the researchers explain that making CAD programs from images "requires alignment between visual geometry and symbolic program representations" which current training methods can't easily or cheaply handle. The problem, they claim, is in "the scarcity of diverse training examples." "Existing finetuning approaches rely on either limited supervised datasets or expensive post-training pipelines, resulting in brittle systems that restrict progress in generative CAD design. We argue that the p…

items.title: Star Wars Zero Company is going all in on Clone customisation, but my favourite armour is restricted to the Deluxe Edition
items.summary: "We think you’ll be very happy."
items.body: While it's one of the biggest games this year , new details on Star Wars Zero Company have been few and far between, even after the gameplay trailer at the start of June. That changed yesterday when developer Bit Reactor hosted a Discord Q&A answering the community's questions on everything from the game's length to permadeath. The thing that stood out to me the most, as a fanatic for character customisation, is how Zero Company is handling its Clone Troopers. User 'WhiteFeather87' kicked things off by asking what we were all wondering: Can you have a full Clone team? The answer is yes, but for two reasons. Firstly, all operators actually have access to Clone armour cosmetics from the start of the game. Secondly, you'll unlock Clone Trooper operators "after a certain point in the story", CEO and creative director Greg Foertsch explains, "allowing you to have a full team of Clone Troopers." (Image credit: Bit Reactor) The coolest detail Bit Reactor confirmed is that Clone helmets will actually add voice modulation to characters. Discord user 'HaPeanut' dug deeper, asking specifically what kind of Clone customisation options we can expect, like ARF, paratroopers, or commandoes. Whil…

items.title: OpenAI admits several of its AI models breached testing and hacked into a startup's network by themselves, calling it an 'unprecedented cyber incident'
items.summary: Containment has been breached.
items.body: OpenAI has admitted that several of its AI models breached a "highly-isolated" test environment, gained access to the internet, and hacked Hugging Face's internal network—describing it as an "unprecedented cyber incident." Hugging Face, an open source platform for machine learning models and datasets, reported the security incident earlier this week, calling it "different from anything we had handled before" as it was driven by an autonomous AI agent system. And yes, I feel like we're crossing some kind of AI Rubicon here. Explaining the incident in a statement , OpenAI said: "After investigating, we now know that this particular incident was driven by a combination of OpenAI models—including GPT‑5.6 Sol and an even more capable pre-release model... while being internally tested on a benchmark⁠ of cyber capabilities." The benchmark in question was ExploitGym , a tool built from hundreds of real-world cybersecurity vulnerabilities used to evaluate the ability of AI agents to develop exploits. After exploiting a zero-day vulnerability to perform a series of privilege escalations, the models eventually reached a node with internet access, reaching out beyond their sandbox environment…

items.title: Someone has already got a regular Nvidia graphics card working on Windows on Arm thanks to RTX Spark drivers, though gaming performance doesn't yet look ideal
items.summary: Still, it's a nice peek into what is surely to come.
items.body: For the longest time, Windows on Arm has been the purview of Snapdragon processors with Adreno CPUs (and occasionally some repurposed Mac silicon). A couple of months ago, though, Nvidia finally announced RTX Spark , an Arm processor with some real GPU grunt. And it seems that might have sparked (sorry) the onset of being able to use at least some Nvidia GPUs with the forked operating system. As spotted by Windows Latest , a developer on Chinese forum Bilibili has managed to get an RTX 4060 working on Windows on Arm using a driver based on the "RTX Spark laptop driver". The dev responsible, VoidTech , suggests this is driver 590. This is an older Nvidia driver, as we're currently at version 610.74 , and it reportedly doesn't support DGX Spark processors that RTX Spark is based on. All this is to say, I'm not sure exactly what is going on with the specific driver in question, but VoidTech does explicitly say it's based on an RTX Spark driver. I have little reason to doubt it, especially given there are now some official drivers for RTX Spark in the wild . The dev gets some games up and running, including the Black Myth: Wukong benchmark. Focusing on that as our test case for a mome…

items.title: The Elder Scrolls Online is already feeling the impact of Xbox's layoffs, ironically hurting the cash shop
items.summary: The MMO is already reeling from reduced "team bandwidth".
items.body: Earlier this month, Microsoft gutted The Elder Scrolls Online , with 379 staff across ZeniMax gone . And this is the second time it's happened in two years. As Harvey and I put it a few weeks ago, ESO's developers deserved better . The developer, now claiming to be the same size it was 10 years ago (similar to id Software), has just debuted ESO's new seasonal structure but will have to continue carving that path with reduced capabilities. Mere weeks after these layoffs, and we're already seeing their effects. Community manager Kevin Gbolie posted an update on the ESO forums outlining updates to the Crown Store, the game's premium cash shop. "To help manage workload, we have decided to remove the Web Crown Store from the official elderscrollsonline.com website on Wednesday, July 22," Gbolie explains. "The ability to acquire crowns via the website will remain and, of course, this does not affect the items that will be offered on the Crown Store in The Elder Scrolls Online, you will just need to login into the game to view and purchase the latest offerings." "Furthermore, for the same reason, the monthly Crown Store Showcase blog will also change." It's ironic that, to combat the inc…

items.title: Nvidia Rubin will 'soak up NAND supply like a sponge absorbs water' says one analyst, thanks to the AI server's new way of using SSDs
items.summary: It looks like context memory storage (CXM) will guzzle a lot of NAND.
items.body: Any time there's potentially positive news about storage and memory supply—such as increasing supply from China —I can't help but think 'sure, but the AI industry will guzzle through it regardless.' Not only is demand seemingly insatiable, but sometimes new developments that encourage even more memory use come along. Case in point here with Nvidia Rubin. As SE Daily reports (machine translated), Nvidia's new 'context memory storage' (CMX) tech , which should be here with its new Rubin servers later this year, is going to chomp through a whole bunch of NAND. "Nvidia's CMX is equipped with 576 SSDs, providing a total storage capacity of 9,600 TB. The industry anticipates that the demand for NAND required for CMX will surge from 35 million TB this year to over 100 million TB next year." Analyst Jukan puts these figures into context on X : "Nvidia’s Rubin CMX will quite literally soak up NAND supply like a sponge absorbs water. To put 100 million TB into perspective, it is roughly equivalent to adding another Apple-sized source of demand to the NAND market." Samsung is apparently attempting to establish itself as a key supplier to Nvidia for this new kind of demand. “Nvidia’s CMX is e…

items.title: US judge closes the book on first big AI copyright suit, ordering Anthropic to pay $1.5 billion settlement
items.summary: The end of the story or just the start of a fresh chapter?
items.body: One reason I'm so anti-generative AI is because many models rely on a data set containing written or visual work used without the original creator's permission. As a writer myself, it's a small comfort then that the copyright suit brought against Anthropic has been settled in favour of the author plaintiffs. Anthropic leveraged a library of millions of pirated books to train its Claude chatbot and, as a result, the AI company is now set to pay out a copyright settlement of $1.5 billion (via Euro News ). Some of the affected authors argued this pay out was too small but, as of July 20, a US judge has now approved the deal, closing the book on one of the largest copyright class action lawsuits in US history. Anthropic agreed to pay the $1.5 billion settlement back in September 2025 , but a US judge only approved the deal this week. The settlement covers an approximate total of 500,000 works, with affected authors and publishers to be paid $3,000 for each pirated work. Anthropic says that 91% of those eligible have now filed a claim. Flicking back to the beginning of this saga, writers Andrea Bartz, Charles Graeber, and Kirk Wallace Johnson originally brought their lawsuit against An…

items.title: Valve puts some elbow grease into Steam Remote Play—maybe one day you won't have to install additional tools to get the best in-home game streaming experience
items.summary: I want 59.94 frames precisely, waiter.
items.body: I don't think I've encountered anyone, in the wild, who actually uses Steam's Remote Play game streaming feature since the days of the hardware Steam Link (and what tremendous days they were). In 2026, I think most people making use of in-home streaming tend to default to programs like Apollo and Moonlight. But Valve keeps working on it, perhaps with renewed vigour owing to the recent release of the Steam Machine and upcoming release of the Steam Frame . In a new update for the Steam client, Valve introduced some new fixes and features for Remote Play, while also bringing in patches for Steam Input, the Steam overlay, the Workshop, and various other gubbins. Steam Remote Play will now let you set a framerate limit of 59.94. This remarkably specific framerate is common in, well, televisions—the kind you might want to stream your videogames to from a desktop PC. Previously, if you had configured Steam to output with a framerate limit of 60 fps, there'd be an ever-so-slight discrepancy between that output and what your 59.94 fps TV was capable of displaying, leading to dropped frames. Speaking of which, Remote Play has also been tweaked in such a way that it has "Reduced frame drops …

items.title: Steam Deck sales are estimated to have plummeted by around 80% since the massive price hikes earlier this year, back of the napkin maths suggests
items.summary: A situation nobody wants.
items.body: The Steam Deck was once a budget champion, but no longer. Ever since the price hikes earlier this year, Valve's handheld has become difficult to argue for as a value proposition—and according to recent sales estimates by Boiling Steam , it appears that consumers may agree. The site has attempted to estimate the number of Steam Deck units sold by tracking its position on the Steam Top Sellers listing, and extrapolating data in relation to the entries above and below it (via XDA ). This back-of-the-napkin maths is hardly definitive, but it suggests that when the Steam Deck dropped from around fourth and fifth on the chart position to between tenth and fifteenth after the price adjustments in May of this year, the drop in weekly units sold would equate to roughly 80-82%. Boiling Steam suggests that a slip to fourteenth on the Top Sellers list from its previous top five position represents a drop in gross revenue of approximately 72%, something the outlet characterises as a "complete collapse in total sales." Presuming Boiling Steam's earlier estimate of between 11,000 and 18,000 units sold a week pre-price increase is correct, the figures would equate to between 1,400 and 3,000 units…

items.title: Arc Raiders' matchmaking optimisation is live as Embark warns players they may experience longer queues than usual 'since it's now working harder'
items.summary: How long would you wait for better teammates?
items.body: The biggest thing to happen in Arc Raiders recently (if you don't count the Expedition near miss ) was Embark's decision to rework the matchmaking to be more attuned to players' actions in solo, duo, and trio queues. The only problem with having better matchmaking is having to wait a bit longer in queue for the game to actually fulfil this promise. "Starting today, we'll be testing adjustments to our matchmaking algorithm aimed at improving the quality of your matches," a dev explains in an official blog post . "One thing to note: the algorithm may take a little longer to find a match, since it's now working harder to find you a better one." (Image credit: Embark) Hopefully, after waiting a bit longer than usual, you'll run into raiders with a similar mindset to yours when you head Topside, those that match your playstyle and squad size "making for more fair and enjoyable raids". This is thanks to the matchmaking taking into account an individual's behaviour while in different squad sizes, meaning you can be a bloodthirsty murderer in solos and a happy-go-lucky team player in squads. So far it seems as if the biggest issue players have isn't with the matchmaking, but what it takes…

items.body: Most players eventually lose the drive to keep grinding a new league, or season, in Path of Exile 2 and simply log off until the next one. Others gather up all their in-game money and spend it on something ridiculous, like an army of 2,000 skeletons. PoE 2 streamer Empyriangaming decided it was time to test the action RPG's limits by creating the most expensive minion builds I've ever seen. We're talking gear that cost him more in-game currency than I've earned over the course of my 700 hours in the game. There's min-maxing and then there's whatever Empyriangaming did to make six complete sets of gear to summon more minions than the game can even handle. Normally, a minion build has around 10 to 15 skeletons accompanying them in PoE 2, but Empyriangaming's crew did some math to figure out how to squeeze out as many of them as possible. The trick is to reduce the resource cost of each minion into single digits and to stack up as much of that resource as you can. Unfortunately, the game refuses to let you summon more than 255 of each minion type before deleting them all and resetting the counter back to zero, so Empyriangaming recruited some friends to bring their own armies. The gr…

items.title: Xbox's new VP of engineering quits just 2 months after taking the job
items.summary: Jared Palmer, who was picked to work directly with CEO Asha Sharma on the division's "most complex" problems, has taken a role at AI company Cognition.
items.body: Just two months after he was appointed the new vice president of engineering at Xbox and technical advisor to CEO Asha Sharma, Jared Palmer is now the former vice president of engineering at Xbox and technical advisor to CEO Asha Sharma. In an update to his LinkedIn profile , Palmer said he's joined AI company Cognition to serve as its vice president of engineering instead. "I’m grateful to Asha and everyone at Microsoft and Xbox for an amazing year," Palmer wrote in a very to-the-point missive. "Excited for this next chapter." "Cognition operates Devin, the first autonomous software engineer," the company's website says, in case you were wondering what it actually does. "Devin plans, writes, tests, and ships production code on its own, working inside your codebase and the tools your team already uses." AI is definitely Palmer's thing: Prior to his brief tenure at Xbox, he was vice president of product at Microsoft's CoreAI division, which Sharma headed up before taking the reins at Xbox. That was a fairly short spin too, lasting just eight months; before that he spent roughly four years as the vice president of AI at AI infrastructure company Vercel. Sharma said when Palmer was a…

items.title: Marathon's experimental PvE mode is live, immediately tripling its daily player count
items.summary: Cryo Archive is open for all, for a limited time.
items.body: Today, Bungie launched Marathon's 1.1.5 update, featuring its awaited Vault Breaker experimental PvE mode which offers a two-week window for players to contend with the typically-endgame Cryo Archive map and its many hazards and puzzles without any twitchy, murderous squads of competing players hanging around. Shortly after the Vault Breaker update went live, SteamDB charts showed that Marathon's concurrent player count had jumped to over 14,800 players. That's not a massive number compared to its peers on Steam's Most Played ranking , but it's roughly triple the activity that Marathon pulled at similar times of day throughout the last week—and the most concurrent player activity since player numbers started bleeding after the June free weekend. Vault Breaker trades Marathon's typical extraction loop for an alternative progression scheme. Unlike in normal excursions, runners in Vault Breaker won't keep any gear they pick up and extract with during a run. Instead, the goal is to loot Vault Data that can be used for persistent upgrades to your initial Vault Breaker kit or spent on gear that can be carried into standard runs, offering a more roguelite framework for Bungie's gunplay. …

items.title: Hasbro takes $56 million hit over multiple game cancellations, but it's still talking about how Baldur's Gate 3 is key to its future success
items.summary: Just a few years after going big on videogames, Hasbro is pulling an Xbox by narrowing its focus on its biggest brands and franchises.
items.body: Two years after boasting about how hard it was going on videogames, Hasbro has recorded a "$56 million non-cash impairment" in its second-quarter financial report , arising from the cancellation of several games in development that were expected to release "in 2028 and beyond." First things first: As PC Gamer's Joshua Wolens explained when Sony took a staggering $766 million impairment against Bungie, that $56 million figure isn't a direct loss. Rather, it's an unexpected decrease in value of an asset compared to its book value, separate from standard depreciation. Just a few years ago, inspired by the massive success of Baldur's Gate 3, Hasbro was going hard on videogames. In 2022 it had a half-dozen game studios working on different projects in its stable; two years later Dan Ayoub, head of digital product development at Hasbro-owned Wizards of the Coast, put a number on that effort, saying "we've got over $1 billion in games right now being developed," and adding that "videogames are an integral part of Hasbro's strategy going into the next 100 years." But it hasn't gone especially smoothly since then. A big-budget GI Joe game announced in 2021 is in trouble, and the deal for a…

items.body: The best games like Stardew Valley (Image credit: NPC Studio, composite by PC Gamer) Fields of Mistria Why : The level of heart and detail in the character dialogue is unmatched. Fields of Mistria ❤️ Romance : Yes ⚔️ Combat : Yes 🤝 Co-op : No After two years of early access and an imminent 1.0 launch, Fields of Mistria has become my absolute favorite in the post-Stardew farm sim scene. It solves so many of my little farm simming gripes with little quality-of-life touches and just feels like it was made with a deep love of the genre. Mistria commits so hard to the '90s anime and Game Boy Advance aesthetic with pastel colors and a bunch of loveable cuties wearing capes and shoulder pads. I can't stress enough that it's got so much substance underneath that anime trope crust, though. Yes March is a textbook tsundere and Juniper is a witch who says "OH HO HO" with that arrogant hand pose when she laughs, but it leaves room for characters who defy stereotypes too. Mistria has so much detailed, character-building dialogue that I truly love getting to know its characters and their quirks.
